name: nPanel
label: nPanel
description: nPanel: nsite gateway + built-in NIP-05 names on the same domain.

requiredConfig.name: Site domain
requiredConfig.description: Per deployment — whatever comes after the long site label in the URL. Examples: relayk.it for one gateway, testsub.example.com for another. RelayKit builds the full host as <npub or base36+d>.<this>. Not a global setting: each nPanel service picks its own.

requiredConfig.name: Publishing key
requiredConfig.description: Hex pubkey (64 hex chars) or npub1… for the account that signs manifests in Shakespeare. Same account for all sites under that key; each site is distinguished by the site id below.

requiredConfig.name: Site id (d tag)
requiredConfig.description: Named site identifier for kind 35128 (Shakespeare). Leave empty only if you publish a root manifest (kind 15128). Must match NIP-5A: 1–13 chars [a-z0-9-], must not end with -.

requiredConfig.name: Public hostname (optional)
requiredConfig.description: What visitors type and DNS should point at (e.g. relayk.it). Leave empty to use only the long NIP-5A hostname. RelayKit registers routing and TLS for this host when you deploy or Save + Redeploy.

requiredConfig.name: NIP-05 users
requiredConfig.description: Comma or newline separated name=npub|hex mappings (e.g. sam=npub1...,alex=hex...).

requiredConfig.name: Event / manifest relays
requiredConfig.description: Comma-separated wss:// URLs for loading events and manifest sync (defaults are fine for most setups).

requiredConfig.name: Discovery relays
requiredConfig.description: Comma-separated wss:// URLs to find routing and Blossom hints for a pubkey.

requiredConfig.name: Blob mirror URLs
requiredConfig.description: Comma-separated https:// Blossom bases when the manifest does not list servers.
